query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the core dependent variable of the user's domain (voice agent capabilities, specifically cross-lingual text-to-speech and voice conversion) using a specific methodology (latent linguistic embeddings) that is essential for evaluating the technical performance of such agents. It also aligns with criterion (a) by investigating the underlying mechanism of voice cloning and generation, which is a fundamental component of the "Voice Agents" framework m
